# doit_cloud_diagrams_schemes (Data Source)

Retrieves Cloud Diagram data including diagrams, layers, and components.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all accessible diagrams (overview mode — no components).
data "doit_cloud_diagrams_schemes" "all" {}

# Output diagram names and their layers.
output "diagrams" {
  value = {
    for key, diagram in data.doit_cloud_diagrams_schemes.all.scheme :
    key => {
      name   = diagram.name
      type   = diagram.type
      layers = [for layer in diagram.statussheet : layer.account_name]
    }
  }
}

# Retrieve specific diagrams with full component data.
data "doit_cloud_diagrams_schemes" "detailed" {
  scheme_ids = ["diagram-id-1", "diagram-id-2"]
  components = true
  skip_empty = true
}

# Retrieve specific layers with components and links.
data "doit_cloud_diagrams_schemes" "layers" {
  layer_ids  = ["layer-id-1"]
  components = true
  link       = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `alarms_count` (Boolean) Include alarm counts (default true).
- `combiner` (Boolean) Include combiners.
- `components` (Boolean) Include components in the layer response.
- `element` (Boolean) Include elements.
- `exclude_default_vpc` (Boolean) Exclude the default VPC group (default true).
- `exclude_empty_subnets` (Boolean) Exclude empty subnet groups (default true).
- `external` (Boolean) Include external (cross-diagram) components.
- `group` (Boolean) Include groups.
- `issues_count` (Boolean) Include issue counts.
- `layer_ids` (List of String) IDs of layers to load. When omitted, returns all layers for the selected diagrams.
- `link` (Boolean) Include links.
- `node_type` (String) Filter components by node type.
Possible values: `app_component`, `app_group`, `app_link`, `attachment`, `group`, `host`, `link`, `service`
- `note` (Boolean) Include notes.
- `scheme_ids` (List of String) IDs of diagrams to load. When omitted, returns all accessible diagrams.
- `skip_empty` (Boolean) Omit diagrams that have no components.
- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))
- `type` (List of String) Filter diagrams by type.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) A deterministic hash of the query parameters, used as the data source identifier.
- `scheme` (Attributes Map) Map of diagram ID to diagram with its connected cloud accounts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scheme))
- `statussheet` (Attributes Map) Map of layer ID to layer metadata and component collections.
Components are projected to key display and cloud fields by default. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet))
- `template` (Attributes) Map of template layer ID to template data. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--template))

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--scheme"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scheme`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Diagram ID.
- `color` (String) Diagram color.
- `name` (String) Diagram name.
- `statussheet` (Attributes List) Connected cloud accounts (layers). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scheme--statussheet))
- `type` (String) Diagram type.

<a id="nestedatt--scheme--statussheet"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scheme.statussheet`

Read-Only:

- `account_name` (String) Connected cloud account name.
- `alarms_count` (Number) Number of active alarms.
- `color` (String) Layer color.
- `empty` (Boolean) True when the layer contains no components.
- `name` (String) Layer name.
- `ssid` (String) Layer ID.



<a id="nestedatt--statussheet"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet`

Read-Only:

- `attachment` (Attributes Map) Map of attachment ID to attachment component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--attachment))
- `combiner` (Attributes Map) Map of combiner ID to combiner component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--combiner))
- `element` (Attributes Map) Map of element ID to element component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--element))
- `group` (Attributes Map) Map of group ID to group component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--group))
- `link` (Attributes Map) Map of link ID to link component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--link))
- `node` (Attributes Map) Map of node ID to node component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--node))
- `note` (Attributes Map) Map of note ID to note component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--note))
- `statussheet` (Attributes) Projected layer metadata returned inside each layer entry.
Contains import state, last updated timestamp, and links version. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--statussheet))

<a id="nestedatt--statussheet--attachment"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet.attachment`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Attachment ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Attachment color.
- `group` (String) Parent group ID.
- `icon` (String) Attachment icon identifier.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this attachment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--attachment--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `props` (Attributes) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--attachment--props))
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

<a id="nestedatt--statussheet--attachment--issues"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet.attachment.issues`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.
- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.


<a id="nestedatt--statussheet--attachment--props"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet.attachment.props`

### Nested Schema for `statussheet.combiner`

Read-Only:

- `icon` (String) Combiner icon identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Components contained in the combiner. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--combiner--items))

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.

- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Element color.
- `icon` (String) Element icon identifier.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this element. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--element--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `parent` (String) Parent element ID.
- `props` (Attributes) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--element--props))

<a id="nestedatt--statussheet--node"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet.node`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Node ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Node color.
- `icon` (String) Node icon identifier.
- `infra_node` (Attributes) Reference to a linked infrastructure node in another diagram. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--node--infra_node))
- `instance_count` (Number) Number of instances represented by this node.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this node. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--node--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `parent` (String) Parent node ID.
- `props` (Attributes) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--node--props))
- `running` (Boolean) Whether the node is currently running.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

<a id="nestedatt--statussheet--node--infra_node"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet.node.infra_node`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Infrastructure node ID.
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Parent layer ID.


<a id="nestedatt--statussheet--node--issues"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet.node.issues`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.
- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.

### Nested Schema for `statussheet.node.props`



<a id="nestedatt--statussheet--note"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet.note`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Note ID.
- `color` (String) Note background color.
- `font_size` (Number) Note font size.
- `text` (String) Note text content.


<a id="nestedatt--statussheet--statussheet"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet.statussheet`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Layer ID.
- `import` (Attributes) Current import/sync state for a cloud-connected diagram. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--statussheet--statussheet--import))
- `links_version` (Number) Links version counter, incremented on every link change.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp of the last update.

<a id="nestedatt--statussheet--statussheet--import"></a>
### Nested Schema for `statussheet.statussheet.import`

Read-Only:

- `account` (String) Connected account ID.
- `cloud_id` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `error_message` (String) Error message if the import failed.
- `status` (String) Import status.
- `synced_at` (String) Timestamp of the last successful sync.
- `type` (String) Connected cloud account type.
